# CVPixelFormatDescription.Registry

**Class**

Registry of all pixel formats.

## Declaration

```swift
final class Registry
```

## Instance Properties

- **formatDescriptions**: Get all registered pixel format descriptions.

## Instance Methods

- **register(_:)**: Register a new pixel format with CoreVideo.

## Subscripts

- **subscript(_:)**: Get the pixel format description for specified format.

## Type Properties

- **shared**: Global pixel format registry.

## Conforms To

- Sendable
- SendableMetatype
